notes: Fixes the generated Bluetooth control helper syntax error from v1.0.14 that made Gamepad settings show N/A.
Adds release-time syntax validation for generated Pi helper scripts so helper heredoc errors fail CI.
Keeps the improved BlueZ gamepad pairing flow for XInput, Android, Switch, 8BitDo-style, and generic HID controllers.
Keeps Gamepad pair, connect, and remove actions off the UI thread so Settings remains responsive while Bluetooth is working.
